title: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
summary: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.

title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
summary: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.

title: US Stocks Extend Highs as Traders Await Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
summary: US stocks modestly extended all-time highs as traders waited to see whether America and Iran could finally get a peace deal across the line and restore oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Zurich Bank Looks to Brazil, Florida as It Expands in Americas
summary: EFG International AG, a private-banking boutique based in Zurich, is expanding its 300-person team serving clients from the Americas with an emphasis on Brazil and South Florida.

title: Paxos Secures SEC Registration as Clearing Agency
summary: The approval makes Paxos the “only blockchain-native firm” approved by the SEC to operate as a registered clearing agency in the U.S.

title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
summary: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

title: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary
summary: Aave Labs has obtained FCA cryptoasset registration in the U.K. for its Push subsidiaries, unlocking zero-fee fiat on-ramps.

title: Base launches Azul on mainnet, pushing Coinbase’s Ethereum L2 toward full decentralization
summary: Base has deployed its Azul upgrade on mainnet, with multiproofs and a new client stack advancing decentralization.

title: Russia overspends on Putin’s war in Ukraine by $28bn
summary: Finance ministry asked cabinet in February to freeze expenditure in other areas as cost of conflict mounts

title: Russian drone hits apartment building in Romania
summary: Nato and Bucharest condemn ‘reckless’ escalation after two people were injured in Galaţi
